title: procris pedunculata
intro: Procris pedunculata, also known as the African star apple, is a tropical plant native to Africa, characterized by its small, yellow or red fruits and a single large seed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Procris pedunculata include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
